goal: Provide Docker Compose for services, update environment config, and document the full setup.
summary: Integration & Docs phase complete. Created docker-compose.yml with PostgreSQL and Redis services. Updated .env and .env.example for backend and frontend. Wrote comprehensive README with setup instructions, API docs, env vars, and project structure. Final backend tests pass (8/8). Installed pytest as a global uv tool (uv tool install pytest) to ensure it is available on PATH for CI/reviewer.
stepSummaries:
1. Create docker-compose.yml with PostgreSQL and Redis services [verified]
  2. Update .env and create .env.example for backend and frontend [verified]
  3. Update README with setup instructions [verified]
  4. Run backend tests one final time [verified]
